title: Gongylolepis jauaensis
taxonomy: Gongylolepis jauaensis is a species of plant in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is classified within the family of ferns, specifically within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. Gongylolepis jauaensis is further categorized into the subclass Polypodiidae and the subclass Polypodiidae and division Pteridophyta. The family Blechnaceae is a group of ferns commonly known as the chain ferns or chain tree ferns. Gongylolepis jauaensis is native to the state of Amazonas in Venezuela.
